jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ECIL
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
